privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic portfolio performance task using fabricated financial data. The task specifies creating a Treasury bond security with ISIN US91282CJL54 (not found in public Treasury databases), purchasing 10 shares at $985.00 each (realistic discount pricing), recording two semi-annual coupon payments of $175.00 each (mathematically correct for 3.5% coupon on $10,000 par value), and entering historical prices ($985.00, $992.50, $997.50) that realistically show bond price convergence toward par. All financial calculations are internally consistent and realistic for Treasury bond scenarios, though the specific ISIN appears fabricated. The portfolio file is created synthetically during task setup.
